description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows KnobKraft Orm that runs on push events. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository with tags, initializes submodules, sets up Python 3.8 for x64 architecture, installs NuGet and Innosetup, and configures msbuild and Windows SDK for building WinSparkle. Additionally, build and install Sentry, configure and build the project with CMake, and upload PDB files to Sentry for stack unwinding on tagged builds.
